reference: I recently had the flu and developed lower back pain. That pain subsided, but then it spread to my hip and hamstring. It hurts when I cough or sneeze as well. I assume it is sciatic in nature, but my hip continues to jam when I do anything active. I have seen a chiropractor and physiotherapist, but the pain has not subsided. Any suggestions?
text: I recently had the flu and developed lower back pain. That pain subsided, but then it spread to my hips and hamstrings; it hurts when I cough or sneeze as well. Is sciatic in nature, but my hip continues to jam when I do anything active. I have seen a chiropractor and physiotherapist, but the pain has not subsided. Any suggestions?
